programs.title: Jane Austen's Pride and Prejudice
programs.desc: With the arrival of Mr. Bingley, Mrs. Bennet looks to marry off one of her five daughters.

programs.title: Jane Austen's Pride and Prejudice
programs.desc: Mrs. Bennet hopes that Mr. Collins will propose to one of her daughters.

programs.title: Jane Austen's Pride and Prejudice
programs.desc: Elizabeth learns that Charlotte is engaged; Jane realizes that the Bingleys are ignoring her.

programs.title: Jane Austen's Pride and Prejudice
programs.desc: Rejected by Elizabeth, Darcy returns to Rosings Park and writes to her.

programs.title: Jane Austen's Pride and Prejudice
programs.desc: Darcy introduces Elizabeth to his sister, Georgiana; Elizabeth receives distressing news.

programs.title: Jane Austen's Pride and Prejudice
programs.desc: Mrs. Bennet is delighted to have one of her daughters married; Elizabeth sees Wickham's true colors.
